description: Intent-only request: classify deterministic payroll calculation as workflow-anchored with no AI involvement.

conversation.text: For each employee row, compute net pay from hours and rate, and write it back to the sheet.

processExpectations: The agent explains that net pay calculation is a deterministic computation requiring reproducibility and auditability, not a task that benefits from LLM judgment.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
